name: Hush Puppies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cornmeal, baking powder, and salt together.
2. Saute the onion in bacon fat until it becomes limp; allow to cool slightly.
3. Beat the egg until light, then stir in the milk and cooled onion.
4. Stir the mixture into the dry ingredients to form a stiff batter.
5. Heat the oil in a deep fryer to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Shape the batter into 3-inch long crescents.
7. Fry the crescents in single-layer batches in hot oil until they turn golden brown.
